items.title: Strait of Hormuz closed again, Iran says, as ships attacked
items.dek: Tehran is blaming a US blockade for its actions, saying it breaches the ceasefire the two reached.
items.body: Tehran is blaming a US blockade for its actions, saying it breaches the ceasefire the two reached.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Messi stunner gives Miami's new coach debut win
items.dek: Lionel Messi had two goals, including a stunning 79th-minute winner, to give Inter Miami a victory in new interim coach Guillermo Hoyos' first match in charge o
items.body: Lionel Messi had two goals, including a stunning 79th-minute winner, to give Inter Miami a victory in new interim coach Guillermo Hoyos' first match in charge on Saturday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: OU wins 4th women's gymnastics title in 5 years
items.dek: Oklahoma senior Faith Torrez drilled the final routine of her career, delivering a near-perfect performance on the floor exercise as the last competitor on the
items.body: Oklahoma senior Faith Torrez drilled the final routine of her career, delivering a near-perfect performance on the floor exercise as the last competitor on the final rotation to help the Sooners win the NCAA women's gymnastics championships on Saturday.
items.author: IriLine Desk
